privileged_info_summary: The task requires saving three real Wikipedia pages as PDFs: Schengen Area (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Schengen_Area), Jet lag (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jet_lag), and Travel document (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Travel_document). All metadata claims about URLs, filenames, and content keywords have been verified as accurate. The data is not synthetic—it consists of real, publicly accessible Wikipedia content. Output directory is /home/ga/Documents/TravelPacket with required filenames: schengen_area.pdf, jet_lag.pdf, and travel_documents.pdf. All three pages contain the claimed keywords: Schengen Area contains 'Schengen', 'border', and 'visa'; Jet lag contains 'jet lag', 'circadian', and 'sleep'; Travel document contains 'passport', 'visa', and 'identity'.
